_note: B2 Decision Intelligence policy — ALL materiality weights, band thresholds, and routine ceiling in one data block (BIZ-0001 / WF-0037 / B2-T1, governed by ADR-0102). Editing any weight or threshold is an ADR act (constitution §9). Modules that use this: runtime/execution/materiality-score.mjs, runtime/execution/decision-need-classifier.mjs.

materialityWeights._note: Additive integer weights. One signal per key. See design doc §2.1.

materialityBands._note: Inclusive bounds. required: score >= required; recommended: recommended <= score <= (required-1); none: score <= none. Design doc §2.2.

emergencyEnvelope._note: K2 EMERGENCY_GOVERNANCE fires ONLY on these token groups (design §6).

decisionScopeMap._note: Used internally; the canonical enum is in decision-enums.mjs.
